name: DJ Kim tripod My (analytical capacity)
source: DJ Kim et al. (2014) J Geotech Geoenviron Eng
notes: Analytical: My = 0.60 * Vu * lever (yield at 60% mobilisation). D=6.5m, L=8.0m, CtC=26.85m, phi=39.18 deg. Vu=6621kN (plug+side+tip).

name: Jeong 2021 cyclic rotation (N=100, power law)
notes: Power law theta=0.0332*N^0.0846 fitted to Jeong data. Exponent b=0.0846 << LeBlanc 0.31 (monopile): tripod accumulates rotation ~4x slower.

name: Jeong 2021 cyclic rotation (N=1M, power law)
notes: Power law extrapolation. DNV limit 0.25 deg. At 1M cycles: 0.107 deg < 0.25 deg limit.

name: OC4 jacket f1 (fixed-base proxy)
source: Popko et al. (2012) OC4 Phase I
notes: Op3 fixed-base f1 is within the OC4 multi-code spread of 0.29-0.33 Hz. A full jacket SubDyn model would give a more direct comparison.
